title: The Winter We Fell in Love
content: The first snow arrived earlier than expected that year. Emma and Nathan had only been friends for a few months, meeting every weekend to explore small cafés around the city. As winter settled in, their routine changed. They walked through quiet streets wrapped in scarves, shared cups of hot chocolate, and spent long evenings talking while snow covered the sidewalks outside. Without noticing exactly when it happened, friendship slowly became affection. On the coldest night of the season, Nathan admitted he had started looking forward to every excuse to see her. Emma smiled because she had been feeling the same way for weeks. Winter eventually disappeared, but the love they discovered during those snowy days stayed with them long after spring arrived.
